source: Carried from PPC_Analysis_2026-04-06 — advertising.amazon.com blocked (5th consecutive day). Updated with confirmed ad spend from Payments Dashboard ($217.48 in current settlement).
data_quality: STALE — keyword-level data from 2026-04-04. Settlement-confirmed ad spend is fresh.

confirmed_ad_spend.source: Payments Dashboard — settlement period 3/28/2026 to present
confirmed_ad_spend.note: This is confirmed spend from Amazon settlement, not estimates. $217.48 over 11 days (3/28-4/8) = ~$19.77/day average.

per_keyword_performance._note: Keyword-level data carried from 2026-04-04 — last successful Campaign Manager scrape

keywords.keyword: cat water fountain stainless steel wireless
wireless stainless steel pet water fountain

wasted_spend.note: ALL 4 active PPC keywords have ZERO conversions. 100% of PPC spend is wasted at keyword level. Settlement data confirms $217.48 in advertising costs for the 11-day settlement period.

action_plan_ranked.rationale: Manual campaign ACoS 179.91% lifetime. Zero conversions on all tracked keywords. $278+ spent with only $210 in attributed sales (3 orders total). Confirmed $217.48 ad spend in 11-day settlement.

action_plan_ranked.action: Reduce auto campaign budget from $15/day to $5/day
action_plan_ranked.rationale: Auto campaign performs relatively better (ACoS 64%) but still losing money. Reduce to gather data at lower cost while working on listing conversion.

action_plan_ranked.action: Negative-match zero-conversion keywords in auto campaign
action_plan_ranked.rationale: Prevent auto campaign from bidding on same keywords that failed in manual campaign

action_plan_ranked.action: Fix listing conversion before resuming any PPC
action_plan_ranked.rationale: 3.38% CVR from organic traffic vs 0% from paid suggests listing or targeting mismatch. Fix before spending more.

action_plan_ranked.action: Test exact-match on 'cordless cat water fountain' at low bid ($0.50)
action_plan_ranked.rationale: 8,900 search volume, 0.42% CTR — best CTR among active keywords. Test with tight bid.

action_plan_ranked.action: Add 'battery operated cat fountain' as exact-match test ($0.50 bid)
action_plan_ranked.rationale: 7,200 search volume, 7/10 competitors use this keyword. Paw Pure doesn't target it yet.

action_plan_ranked.action: Add 'quiet cat water fountain' as exact-match test ($0.50 bid)
action_plan_ranked.rationale: 4,100 search volume. Paw Pure's 20dB claim is a genuine differentiator for this keyword.
Paw Pure lacks motion sensor. 8/10 competitors have it. Wasted clicks from shoppers expecting this feature.

action_plan_ranked.action: Negative-match 'with app' and 'wifi' across all campaigns
action_plan_ranked.rationale: HAPAW 2026 has app/WiFi — Paw Pure doesn't. Avoid clicks from shoppers looking for smart features.

action_plan_ranked.action: Monitor organic BSR recovery before scaling PPC back up
action_plan_ranked.rationale: BSR improved 39K positions (168,729→129,598). Let organic momentum build before reintroducing heavy PPC.

single_most_important_action.action: PAUSE manual campaigns and reduce auto to $5/day IMMEDIATELY
single_most_important_action.why: Confirmed $217.48 ad spend in 11 days with zero PPC conversions on all tracked keywords. Business is hemorrhaging cash — settlement shows -$294.50 balance with $246.63 in storage fees ON TOP of ad waste. Every day without pausing costs ~$20 in pure waste.
single_most_important_action.expected_impact: Save ~$245/week ($1,000+/month). Combined with organic BSR improvement, pause won't significantly impact the 9 organic units being sold.
